Version 0.1
define altrROOM(numeric room,
numeric ca,
numeric val)
ALTR val val val
Version 0.1
define centrey(agent a)
POSY
define changeCaOfROOM(numeric ca,
numeric val)
ALTR val val val
define numeric DEBUG
define end()
QUIT KILL OWNER
